name: Menu_Prg_ChequesManuales
wl_code:
IF sIdentifier="31" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 31, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 32, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 33, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 32, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 33, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="32" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 32, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="33" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 33, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
END
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 32, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento32 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 33, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento33 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 31, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nElemento32=0 AND nElemento33=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nElemento32=1 AND nElemento33=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nElemento32=1 OR nElemento33=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Menu_Prg_Servicios
